query: Please assist in devising a week-long travel plan, beginning in Jacksonville and venturing through 3 distinct cities in Massachusetts from March 22nd to March 28th, 2022. The budget for this solo journey is set at $6,600.

plan.transportation: self-driving, from Jacksonville to Martha's Vineyard, duration: 18 hours 51 mins, distance: 1,927 km, cost: 96
plan.attraction: Martha's Vineyard Museum; East Chop Lighthouse; Aquinnah Cliffs Overlook;
Flying Horses Carousel a Vineyard Preservation Trust Property; Vincent House Museum; Wasque Point Wildlife Management Area;

plan.transportation: self-driving, from Martha's Vineyard to Hyannis, duration: 2 hours 7 mins, distance: 49.5 km, cost: 2
plan.attraction: John F. Kennedy Hyannis Museum; Cape Cod Maritime Museum; Kalmus Park Beach;
plan.accommodation: Sunny bedroom at the heart of Harlem, Hyannis

plan.attraction: Whydah Pirate Museum; Cape Cod Beer; Veterans Memorial Park;
plan.dinner: Chokho Jeeman Marwari Jain Bhojanalya, Hyannis
plan.accommodation: Sunny bedroom at the heart of Harlem, Hyannis

plan.transportation: self-driving, from Hyannis to Nantucket, duration: 2 hours 17 mins, distance: 47.0 km, cost: 2
plan.attraction: Whaling Museum; Great Point Lighthouse; Nantucket Shipwreck and Life Saving Museum;
plan.accommodation: Spacious studio apartment on ideal LES block, Nantucket

plan.attraction: Coskata-Coatue Wildlife Refuge Gatehouse; Salt Marsh Way Beach; Jethro Coffin House;
plan.accommodation: Spacious studio apartment on ideal LES block, Nantucket

plan.transportation: self-driving, from Nantucket to Jacksonville, duration: 20 hours 9 mins, distance: 1,967 km, cost: 98
